Our Story

Crafted with passion,
worn with pride

At Sky Cashmere, we believe luxury is not just about what you wear, but how it makes you feel. Each piece is carefully crafted from the finest cashmere, ensuring unmatched quality and timeless elegance.

Founded in 2020, we've built our reputation on exceptional quality, sustainable practices, and a commitment to customer satisfaction. Every garment tells a story of craftsmanship, tradition, and modern sophistication.

Learn moreRead our blog
Our promise

Why Sky Cashmere

We build every piece to last and to be worn with pride.

Finest materials

Only the highest-grade cashmere and natural fibres.

Craftsmanship

Every piece made with care and attention to detail.

Thoughtful sourcing

We care about how and where our materials come from.

Made to last

Timeless design and durability you can rely on.

Learn our story

Free Shipping

On orders over AED 500

Easy Returns

30-day hassle-free return policy

Secure Payment

SSL encrypted secure checkout

24/7 Support

Dedicated customer service team
